name: craftcms-claude-skills
description: Production-ready skills and agents for Craft CMS 5 development. Plugin development (elements, services, controllers, migrations, events, testing, headless, configuration), site development (content modeling, Twig templates, atomic design, multi-site), a name-routed index of 23 plugin references (config, Twig/PHP API, migrations, deployment, pitfalls), Craft Cloud and Servd managed hosting (deploy pipelines, static/edge caching, ephemeral filesystem, asset storage, plugin compatibility), and Garnish JS UI toolkit (modals, HUDs, drag-sort, menus, selection, accessibility). 11 skills, 6 specialized agents with explicit build-verify gates, project scaffolding.
